pages.text: The $(item)Large Nether Basalt Skyseed$() — a $(item)Large Badlands Skyseed$() centred in basalt + gilded blackstone. A vast Basalt Deltas.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Basalt and gilded blackstone from any $(item)Nether Basalt$() isle.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A vast, hazardous $(bold)Basalt Deltas$() — a forest of basalt columns, magma underfoot, and $(item)gilded blackstone$() salted through the core for $(item)gold$().
$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Large Badlands Skyseed$() in the centre of a 3x3 of $(item)basalt$() and $(item)gilded blackstone$().
